use_cases: Display QR codes for two-factor authentication or login verification
Reveal mobile app download links on hover for app promotion pages
Show payment QR codes for checkout or donation flows
Provide quick access to contact or vCard information in business profiles
Enable product information lookup by scanning in retail or inventory systems
ai_summary: A hover-triggered QR code button component featuring soft pastel gradients with neon glow effects. The component displays a circular icon button that reveals a larger QR code in a floating popover card on mouse hover, using smooth scale and opacity transitions. Built with Tailwind CSS and lucide-react icons, it combines glassmorphism aesthetics with interactive hover-reveal functionality for quick access to scannable content.
